nasb.text: The Lord said to Samuel, “Listen to their voice and appoint them a king.” So Samuel said to the men of Israel, “Go every man to his city.”

esv.text: And the Lord said to Samuel, “Obey their voice and make them a king.” Samuel then said to the men of Israel, “Go every man to his city.”

cnv.text: 耶和華對撒母耳說：“你只管聽從他們的話，為他們立一個王。”於是撒母耳對以色列人說：“你們各人回自己的城去吧。”

ccb.text: 耶和华对撒母耳说：“照他们说的去为他们立一个王吧。”于是，撒母耳对以色列人说：“你们各人回自己的城去吧。”
